overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from a narrow graffiti-covered alley, across a street under an overpass, along a palm-lined sidewalk with neon billboards, and finally ascends an outdoor staircase. Heavy rain and yellowish atmospheric haze create a moody, cinematic atmosphere with reflective wet surfaces and glowing neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with graffiti and wrecked vehicles

events.description: passing a steam vent emitting yellowish smoke from the ground

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked alley, passing wrecked cars and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in black graffiti tags including large YZY lettering
damaged and abandoned vehicles parked along the alley wall
large illuminated advertising screens showing vehicle commercials
large concrete blocks and construction barriers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-soaked cyberpunk alley with heavy atmospheric haze. The camera moves forward past wrecked cars and concrete barriers on the left, while a graffiti-covered wall dominates the right side. Digital billboards glow in the distance overhead, and steam rises from a vent in the pavement as pedestrians walk ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk with glowing green WALK projection on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk under the overpass, moving with the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a glowing green umbrella walking alongside the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying Matapang Coffee logo with green emblem
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with glowing green WALK text
tall pole with traffic signals and street lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass. The camera approaches and crosses a glowing crosswalk with a green WALK projection, while the Matapang Coffee billboard becomes prominent on the right. Pedestrians with glowing umbrellas move in the same direction, and the graffiti walls of the previous alley fade behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined commercial sidewalk with large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk passing various pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas

notable_agents.action: two figures seated on a bench against the building wall

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
small food vendor stall with bright purple neon lighting and menu displays

segments.scene_description: Walking along a palm-lined sidewalk with wet reflective pavement, the camera passes by large vertical digital billboards on the right displaying various advertisements. The environment is more exposed to the rain, with palm trees lining the left side. A neon-lit food stall with purple lighting appears on the right as the camera moves forward, while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor escalator ascent leading to upper city level

events.description: beginning ascent up the outdoor staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking up the outdoor stairs following a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple glowing umbrella ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: long outdoor staircase with metal railings leading upward to an overpass
tall cylindrical building with red neon vertical lighting in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches and ascends an outdoor staircase leading to an upper city level. A distinctive red neon-lit tower rises in the background, while the camera follows a pedestrian with a purple glowing umbrella up the stairs. The neon food stall and palm trees recede behind as the ascent begins, with digital billboards now visible on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, rain-soaked alleyway into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a cyberpunk city. It begins by moving through a narrow passage filled with atmospheric haze, passing wrecked cars and graffiti-covered walls as steam rises from the pavement. As the camera emerges from the alley, the space opens into a wide intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass, crossing a glowing green crosswalk while the surrounding walls give way to towering digital billboards. The scene then shifts to a palm-lined sidewalk where the camera glides past reflective wet pavement and a purple-lit food stall, moving through a crowd of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas. Finally, the path turns toward an outdoor staircase, ascending toward an upper city level as a red neon tower rises in the background and the street-level lights recede.
